preToolUse.command: INPUT=$(cat) && TOOL_INPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input // empty') && CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'gh\s+pr\s+create|git\s+checkout\s+-b|git\s+switch\s+-c'; then {{GT_BIN}} tap guard pr-workflow 2>/dev/null || exit 2; fi
